---
title: "Plot Exploration"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(plotly)

participant_data <- read.csv("../../data/processed/characteristics_genus_species_dietary_inner.csv")
genus_cols <- grep("^g__", names(participant_data), value = TRUE)
```

# Import

```{r}

```

# Composition



# Relationships

## Disease Associated Mycobiome Signatures

### Maybe interactive heat map?
